title: haworthia retusa var. springbokvlakensis

This plant is known for its unique, symmetrical rosettes and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. Research suggests that Haworthia retusa var. springbokvlakensis has potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in soothing stress and promoting relaxation.
